data.body: Graph split landed (this commit): test_ticket_graph.py (2792 LOC, 59 fns/65 cases) -> tests/scripts/graph/ (7 seam files + conftest [graph fixture + autouse git-isolation] + _helpers [write helpers + loader]). Count-neutral (scripts tier 383), all 65 green, 0 guard hits. Both Python monoliths now done; only the bash-suite split decision remains (recommend folding into adult-oxide-slave).
